name: PetroCorp Group Inc.
summary: PetroCorp Group Inc. does not have significant operations. The company intends to identify, acquire, or merge with an operating company. Previously, it was involved in the electrical and instrumentation construction and maintenance, the provision of valve services, and electrical equipment manufacturing activities. The company was formerly known as PowerComm Inc. and changed its name to PetroCorp Group Inc. in December 2009. PetroCorp Group Inc. was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Thornhill, Canada.
